introSection: Jozi Express is a Zierer steel roller coaster located at Gold Reef City in Johannesburg, Gauteng, South Africa. It is a custom Force model that opened in 2004.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Jozi Express features several turnarounds, making for a twisted design.

fullText:
Jozi Express is a Zierer steel roller coaster located at Gold Reef City in Johannesburg, Gauteng, South Africa. It is a custom Force model that opened in 2004.

Jozi Express features several turnarounds, making for a twisted design.
